content:
A collection of compatibility issues of experimental setting extensions.experimental.affinity in Visual Studio Code.
vscode.markdown-language-features Markdown Footnotes not working Color themes not working in Markdown Preview vscode.git 和 vscode.git-base GitLens Add Co-authors and Issue/PR completion not working Convetional Commits: Extension vscode.git not found! bierner.markdown-mermaid Mermaid Charts sometimes not rendering
title: Visual Studio Code extensions.experimental.affinity compatibility issues
